# α=1.0 Stereotype Bias + Alignment Comparison (Steering Experiments)
**Date:** auto-generated by `experiments/analyze_alpha1_results.py`
**Dataset:** `data/merged_all_aggregated.csv` (1,831 cases × 3 seeds = 5,493 images per experiment)
**Evaluators (Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B-Instruct, OpenRouter API + local):**
- **Bias score**: 0–5 (lower = better).
- **Alignment**: binary aligned with `prompt_neutral` (higher = better).
**Coverage:** 8 steering experiments (exp 4–11) × 5,493 images × 2 judges = 87,888 VLM evaluations.
> **Companion to** `reports/all_experiments_comparison.md` (which uses α=2.0 for steering experiments). Non-steering experiments (0–3) do not use α and have the same numbers in both reports.

---
## 1. Experiment Legend
| ID | Name | Family | KG source | Intervention | α |
|----|------|--------|-----------|--------------|---|
| 0 | baseline | none | — | raw prompt | — |
| 1 | llm_rewrite_no_kg | prompt rewrite | — | LLM rewrite without KG | — |
| 2 | extracted_kg_llm_rewrite | prompt rewrite | extracted | LLM rewrite + extracted KG | — |
| 3 | gt_kg_llm_rewrite | prompt rewrite | GT | LLM rewrite + GT KG | — |
| 4 | extracted_kg_full_triple_sv | steering vector | extracted | full-triple SV | **1.0** |
| 5 | extracted_kg_tail_sv | steering vector | extracted | tail-only SV | **1.0** |
| 6 | gt_kg_full_triple_sv | steering vector | GT | full-triple SV | **1.0** |
| 7 | gt_kg_tail_sv | steering vector | GT | tail-only SV | **1.0** |
| 8 | extracted_kg_llm_pair_sv | steering vector | extracted | LLM-generated pair SV | **1.0** |
| 9 | gt_kg_llm_pair_sv | steering vector | GT | LLM-generated pair SV | **1.0** |
| 10 | extracted_kg_gt_pair_sv | steering vector | extracted | GT pair SV | **1.0** |
| 11 | gt_kg_gt_pair_sv | steering vector | GT | GT pair SV | **1.0** |

---
## 2. Joint Results — ranked by composite score
**Composite** = `aligned_rate × (1 − bias_mean/5) × 100`. Baseline = 28.17.

| Rank | Exp | Name | Bias mean | Bias Δ vs base | Aligned % | Align Δ vs base | **Composite** |
|---:|---:|------|------:|---------:|--------:|----------:|----:|
| 1 | **3** | gt_kg_llm_rewrite | 2.597 | -23.4% | 80.4% | -7.2 pts | **38.62** |
| 2 | **11** | gt_kg_gt_pair_sv | 2.591 | -23.6% | 77.3% | -10.3 pts | **37.23** |
| 3 | **7** | gt_kg_tail_sv | 3.014 | -11.1% | 85.1% | -2.4 pts | **33.81** |
| 4 | 9 | gt_kg_llm_pair_sv | 1.661 | -51.0% | 46.3% | -41.2 pts | 30.92 |
| 5 | 1 | llm_rewrite_no_kg | 3.009 | -11.3% | 76.4% | -11.1 pts | 30.41 |
| 6 | 2 | extracted_kg_llm_rewrite | 2.965 | -12.6% | 73.9% | -13.7 pts | 30.06 |
| 7 | 6 | gt_kg_full_triple_sv | 3.163 | -6.7% | 81.8% | -5.7 pts | 30.06 |
| 8 | 5 | extracted_kg_tail_sv | 3.340 | -1.5% | 85.1% | -2.5 pts | 28.24 |
| — | 0 | **baseline** | 3.391 | 0.0% | **87.5%** | 0.0 pts | **28.17** |
| 9 | 10 | extracted_kg_gt_pair_sv | 3.148 | -7.2% | 74.1% | -13.4 pts | 27.46 |
| 10 | 4 | extracted_kg_full_triple_sv | 3.357 | -1.0% | 81.9% | -5.6 pts | 26.93 |
| 11 | 8 | extracted_kg_llm_pair_sv | 2.468 | -27.2% | 45.7% | -41.8 pts | 23.16 |

## 3. Bias on *aligned-only* images — the real debiasing signal
Filter to images the alignment judge said correctly depict the neutral prompt, then compute mean bias on that subset.

| 9 | gt_kg_llm_pair_sv | 2,543 | 2.265 | 1.661 | +0.605 |
| 3 | gt_kg_llm_rewrite | 4,414 | 2.763 | 2.597 | +0.165 |
| 11 | gt_kg_gt_pair_sv | 4,244 | 2.782 | 2.591 | +0.191 |
| 8 | extracted_kg_llm_pair_sv | 2,512 | 3.062 | 2.468 | +0.594 |
| 7 | gt_kg_tail_sv | 4,676 | 3.124 | 3.014 | +0.110 |
| 2 | extracted_kg_llm_rewrite | 4,058 | 3.225 | 2.965 | +0.260 |
| 1 | llm_rewrite_no_kg | 4,196 | 3.262 | 3.009 | +0.253 |
| 6 | gt_kg_full_triple_sv | 4,494 | 3.314 | 3.163 | +0.150 |
| 10 | extracted_kg_gt_pair_sv | 4,072 | 3.377 | 3.148 | +0.229 |
| 5 | extracted_kg_tail_sv | 4,673 | 3.434 | 3.340 | +0.094 |
| 0 | baseline | 4,808 | 3.436 | 3.391 | +0.045 |
| 4 | extracted_kg_full_triple_sv | 4,501 | 3.493 | 3.357 | +0.136 |

## 4. Alignment flip analysis (per image vs baseline)
For each shared `(case_id, seed)`, compare whether the alignment verdict flipped vs baseline.

| Exp | Name | Kept aligned | **Lost alignment** | Recovered | Stayed misaligned |
|---:|------|------:|------:|------:|------:|
| 7 | gt_kg_tail_sv | 80.2% | **7.3%** | 4.9% | 7.6% |
| 5 | extracted_kg_tail_sv | 80.2% | **7.4%** | 4.9% | 7.6% |
| 6 | gt_kg_full_triple_sv | 77.3% | **10.2%** | 4.5% | 7.9% |
| 4 | extracted_kg_full_triple_sv | 77.2% | **10.3%** | 4.7% | 7.8% |
| 3 | gt_kg_llm_rewrite | 75.1% | **12.5%** | 5.3% | 7.2% |
| 11 | gt_kg_gt_pair_sv | 73.1% | **14.4%** | 4.1% | 8.4% |
| 1 | llm_rewrite_no_kg | 71.3% | **16.3%** | 5.1% | 7.4% |
| 10 | extracted_kg_gt_pair_sv | 70.0% | **17.5%** | 4.1% | 8.4% |
| 2 | extracted_kg_llm_rewrite | 68.9% | **18.7%** | 5.0% | 7.5% |
| 9 | gt_kg_llm_pair_sv | 44.4% | **43.1%** | 1.9% | 10.6% |
| 8 | extracted_kg_llm_pair_sv | 43.5% | **44.1%** | 2.3% | 10.2% |

|---:|---:|--------|----------:|----------:|----------:|----------------:|
| 1 | **2** | **extracted_kg_llm_rewrite** | 2.965 | 73.9% | **30.06** | 3.225 |
| 2 | **5** | **extracted_kg_tail_sv** | 3.340 | 85.1% | **28.24** | 3.434 |
| 3 | **10** | **extracted_kg_gt_pair_sv** | 3.148 | 74.1% | **27.46** | 3.377 |
| 4 | **4** | **extracted_kg_full_triple_sv** | 3.357 | 81.9% | **26.93** | 3.493 |
| 5 | **8** | **extracted_kg_llm_pair_sv** | 2.468 | 45.7% | **23.16** | 3.062 |
| — | *1* | *no-KG rewrite (ref)* | *3.009* | *76.4%* | *30.41* | *3.262* |
| — | *0* | *baseline (ref)* | *3.391* | *87.5%* | *28.17* | *3.436* |

| KG source | Rewrite (exp) | Best SV (exp) | Δ composite (SV − rewrite) |
|-----------|:-------------:|:-------------:|---------------------------:|
| **Extracted** | 2: 30.06 | Exp 5 tail (28.24) | **-1.82** |
| **GT** | 3: 38.62 | Exp 11 GT-pair (37.23) | **-1.39** |
| None (no-KG) | 1: 30.41 | — | N/A |

## 12. α=1 vs α=2 contrast (steering experiments)
Per-exp comparison of α=1 (this report) vs α=2 (master report). Negative `Δ bias` means α=2 reduces bias more; positive `Δ aligned` means α=1 retains more alignment.

| Exp | Name | α=1 bias | α=2 bias | Δ bias (α=2 − α=1) | α=1 aligned % | α=2 aligned % | Δ aligned (α=1 − α=2) | α=1 composite | α=2 composite | Δ composite (α=1 − α=2) |
|---:|------|------:|------:|------:|------:|------:|------:|------:|------:|------:|
| 4 | extracted_kg_full_triple_sv | 3.357 | 3.203 | -0.154 | 81.9% | 74.6% | +7.3 pts | 26.93 | 26.82 | +0.11 |
| 5 | extracted_kg_tail_sv | 3.340 | 2.802 | -0.539 | 85.1% | 68.8% | +16.3 pts | 28.24 | 30.24 | -2.00 |
| 6 | gt_kg_full_triple_sv | 3.163 | 2.794 | -0.369 | 81.8% | 74.7% | +7.2 pts | 30.06 | 32.94 | -2.88 |
| 7 | gt_kg_tail_sv | 3.014 | 2.180 | -0.835 | 85.1% | 71.0% | +14.1 pts | 33.81 | 40.07 | -6.26 |
| 8 | extracted_kg_llm_pair_sv | 2.468 | 1.683 | -0.785 | 45.7% | 21.7% | +24.1 pts | 23.16 | 14.37 | +8.79 |
| 9 | gt_kg_llm_pair_sv | 1.661 | 1.011 | -0.650 | 46.3% | 23.2% | +23.1 pts | 30.92 | 18.52 | +12.40 |
| 10 | extracted_kg_gt_pair_sv | 3.148 | 2.792 | -0.356 | 74.1% | 62.9% | +11.2 pts | 27.46 | 27.80 | -0.33 |
| 11 | gt_kg_gt_pair_sv | 2.591 | 1.992 | -0.599 | 77.3% | 67.5% | +9.8 pts | 37.23 | 40.61 | -3.38 |

---
## 13. Headline numbers (auto-summary)

- **Realistic (extracted KG) winner at α=1**: Exp 2 (extracted_kg_llm_rewrite) — composite **30.06** (baseline 28.17).
- **Ideal (GT KG) winner at α=1**: Exp 3 (gt_kg_llm_rewrite) — composite **38.62**.
- **α=1 outperforms α=2 on composite for 3/8 steering exps**: 4, 8, 9.
- **α=1 retains more alignment than α=2 in 8/8 steering exps**: 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11.
- **α=1 produces lower bias than α=2 in 0/8 steering exps**: (none).

Detailed prose interpretation lives in the master report; this report supplies the α=1 numbers it needs.

---
## 14. Raw Files

- α=1 bias scores (steering exps): `cache/eval_results/exp_NN_alpha1_eval.{csv,jsonl}` (NN ∈ 04..11)
- α=1 alignment (steering exps): `cache/eval_results/exp_NN_alpha1_alignment.{csv,jsonl}` (NN ∈ 04..11)
- Non-steering baselines (α-less): `cache/eval_results/exp_NN_{eval,alignment}.{csv,jsonl}` (NN ∈ 00..03)
- α=2 contrast (§12): `cache/eval_results/exp_NN_{eval,alignment}.{csv,jsonl}` (NN ∈ 04..11)
- Input manifest: `data/merged_all_aggregated.csv` (1,831 cases)
- Analysis driver: `experiments/analyze_alpha1_results.py` (re-runnable)

---
## Footnote — exp_04 duplicate handling

`cache/eval_results/exp_04_alpha1_eval.{jsonl,csv}` and the matching alignment files contain **5,642 rows but only 5,493 unique** `(case_id, alpha, seed)` keys. The 149 duplicates leaked from a broken-launch flush during the first local-Qwen evaluation pass on 2026-05-02 (a SLURM image-generation job overwrote the manifest mid-run). All other steering experiments are clean. This script applies `drop_duplicates(['case_id','alpha','seed'])` uniformly to every input file, so the metrics above are computed on the correct 5,493-image population for exp_04 too.
